rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors
Preserve existing architecture and only add necessary AGREE annex content
Use only visible identifiers in guarantees and assumptions
Place component type contracts in component type annexes and implementation contracts in implementation annexes
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use AGREE logical operators for branching logic and implications
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `if ... then ... else` for branching logic in equations
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not use undeclared identifiers in guarantees or assumptions
Do not mix scalar types in expressions without explicit conversion
